_comment: Hooks for spring-boot-plugin. PostToolUse: optionally format changed Java files via Spotless when configured in Maven or Gradle. Skips silently when not present.

hooks.command: f="$CLAUDE_FILE"; case "$f" in *.java) [ -f pom.xml ] && grep -q 'spotless' pom.xml 2>/dev/null && ./mvnw -q spotless:apply -Dspotless.check.skip=true 2>/dev/null; [ -f build.gradle.kts ] && grep -q 'spotless' build.gradle.kts 2>/dev/null && ./gradlew -q spotlessApply 2>/dev/null; [ -f build.gradle ] && grep -q 'spotless' build.gradle 2>/dev/null && ./gradlew -q spotlessApply 2>/dev/null; exit 0;; esac
